reviews.review_title: Can't connect Google photos for my 360
reviews.review_description: Cannot connect to my Google photos to access the 360° photos there. WTF. Google photos is a major player in cloud photo service why would not you include that?

Horrible can't even open it keeps telling me error
Do not pay for this app

reviews.review_title: Nice of you to ignore the consumers.
reviews.review_description: This was great the way it was, and with all the comments regarding people who don't use friggin FACEBOOK, and would like to use their camera roll again, I'm surprised there hasn't already been an update just to keep it as an option.  Just as these developers have to cram FACEBOOK down our throats when you removed Oculus Rooms. If the mission was to turn more people on to VR, FACEBOOK is surely getting in the way of that.   Listen to the people that are spending their money on your products and return these 'once great services ' back to the way they were.

reviews.review_title: I had enjoyed watching my 3D movies
reviews.review_description: and now when I go to watch them they're the size of a business card and I cannot zoom in anymore. what ever update you did make it not worth it anymore. (Oculus Go)
Make it possible to invite friends to watch media on our oculus.. other than that it’s a good app just wish it was social/online

Was my go to media player. I would download my movies and get immersed in the cinema mode. Now when I load them, I'm still in the empty theater, but I'm looking at a black screen with flashing edges- no movie at all.  Please fix!!
Amazing. 5 star

reviews.review_title: Oculus - Such a powerful device - such..
reviews.review_description: BS to operate....I've been working for hours to get connected to a laptop, get files uploaded, find access with another app (better viewing screens) to view movies, like Bigscreen, but that has been completely frustrating and unsuccessful...to the point I am now wasting time writing a review about it...Quest is my first VR device to own but I've been tech connected since we were writing FORTRAN...this feels like it was rushed and not thought out for compatibility issues...it is an amazing powerful device and the potential I see is boundless...but this introduction has not be encouraging...it is my career to trouble shoot things of this nature so I will prevail short of writing my own platforms!!! I am also a little discouraged by the amount of accessible content for Quest...I know it has been released for connection to a GPC but then it may as well be a rift-s and then for that matter other manufactures, for more cost, produce top end gear....anyway...rant over...back to troubleshooting...where or where oh frickin' where is the remote desk mode!!????

This is good for managing files. But, i think you should make a phone app or something like that so that you can download your screenshots and videoshots to send to friends and share on more than just Facebook

reviews.review_title: Smooth player, but lacks basic features.
reviews.review_description: The performance itself is superb. However, the one thing that really bothers me is how severely it is lacking in features and options. Just adding some simple stuff, such as a basic image adjustment options (contrast, saturation, etc), zoom option, ability to reorientate the video, manual 60/72hz toggle option, and possibly an IPD adjustment ability for those of us who are a bit out of the standard range... It would make all the other players more or less useless to me. Hopefully this app will get enhanced with time.
A decent content thumbnail viewer. I would prefer a movie button on the lower hud, but not a big deal.

Have to keep connecting to the phone and giving it permission to view camera roll. In addition to that it takes forever to view photos and video. I get lots of errors saying it cannot play the video and other times it will play videos. So it's hit and miss if your going to be able to view a video off of your camera roll I've even had it load a partial video and stop.
When I sync my iPhone camera roll the videos play upside down! There’s no way to fix that?
Thank you for allowing Dropbox access to my pictures. Please add a shuffle feature to the viewer.

reviews.review_title: Live view and offline videos on phone
reviews.review_description:
1st) It's sad only way to watch our recorded videos is through the oculus headset and not offline on the phone... Oculus or Facebook needs to fix it this is not acceptable for customers.
2nd) Headset live view should be available ASAP it is mandatory I bought 2 Oculus Go headsets because I want to share the headset live view with my grandmother she can't move her hands and doesn't have idea of what technology is... I would love to share a video, a movie or family pics with her if she can wear the 2nd headset I bought but unfortunately the headset live view is BETA... Comeeee ooooon Facebook, Oculus or whoever... You must fix these issues and make an UPDATE before customers run away
It was impossible to sort pictures in the desired sequence. I give up.

reviews.review_title: Will not allow access to camera roll
reviews.review_description: Even with access allowed and Bluetooth connected, cannot access camera roll.

reviews.review_title: .srt subtitle looks bolder cant be read
reviews.review_description: .srt subtitle for local video looks bolder and cant be read because every font/character stick each other...please fix it !! 🙏
Jabbar sheakh
Unable to view camera roll
